# Glam

## Effect

This card has Replay once per combat.

## Sources And Targets

| Source | Source type | Target |
|---|---|---|
| Glitter | Ancient Relic: Nonupeipe | All future card rewards |

## Notes

- Cards can only have one enchantment.
